title: Mixed-Use Development Reshapes Suburban Retail Corridors
summary: Suburban retail corridors are undergoing a fundamental shift as developers increasingly blend residential, retail, and office components into integrated mixed-use projects. The trend is most visible in metros like Nashville, Philadelphia, and West Palm Beach, where aging strip centers are giving way to walkable, amenity-rich environments. Analysts say the model is proving more resilient to economic cycles than single-use retail properties.
